general_inquiry.question: Find the second order series of the inverse of the following function around 2: $\tan ^{-1}(3 x)$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response:
The second order series of the inverse of the function \(\tan^{-1}(3x)\) around \(x = 2\) is given by:

\[ \tan^{-1}(3x) \approx \tan^{-1}(6) + \frac{3}{37}(x - 2) - \frac{108}{1369}(x - 2)^2 \]
